title: On some geometric interpretations of fractional-order operators
summary: This discussion paper presents some parts of the work in progress. It is shown that G.W. Leibniz was the first who raised the question about geometric interpretation of fractional-order operators. Geometric interpretations of the Riemann--Liouville fractional integral and the Stieltjes integral are explained. Then, for the first time, a geometric interpretation of the Stieltjes derivatives is introduced, which holds also for so-called ``fractal derivatives'', which are a particular case of Stieltjes derivatives.
